name: Tego Cyber, Inc.
summary: PART I The Company Overview Tego Cyber Inc. (the Company or We or Our) is a Nevada based publicly traded cybersecurity company. It was created to mitigate the disparity in the rapidly evolving cyber threat hunting, correlation, and threat intelligence market. The company is focused on developing solutions for threat intelligence and autonomous threat hunting/correlation.
